ddls:
CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "gloss" TEXT /* Gloss of the utterance */,
  "stem" TEXT /* Stem of the utterance */,
  "actual_phonology" TEXT /* Actual phonology of the utterance */,
  "model_phonology" TEXT /* Model phonology of the utterance */,
  "utterance_type" TEXT /* Type of the utterance (e.g., declarative, question) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the utterance */,
  "num_morphemes" INTEGER /* Number of morphemes in the utterance */,
  "num_tokens" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the utterance */,
  "utterance_order" INTEGER /* Order of the utterance in the sequence */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corpus from which the utterance is drawn */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the utterance */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "target_child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target child */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the utterance was recorded */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the phonological analysis */,
  "researcher_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes by researchers */,
  "media_start" REAL /* Start time of media in seconds */,
  "media_end" REAL /* End time of media in seconds */,
  "media_unit" TEXT /* Unit of media (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection to which this utterance belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_target_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_child_id") REFERENCES target_children ("target_child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker (e.g., mother, father) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the speaker */,
  "relationship_to_child" TEXT /* Relationship to the target child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_children" (
  "target_child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target child */,
  "target_child_name" TEXT /* Name of the target child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the target child */,
  "target_child_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the target child */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the target child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpora" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corpus */,
  "corpus_name" TEXT /* Name of the corpus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corpus */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the corpus data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding utterance */,
  "transcriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcriber */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was done */,
  "transcript_text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_records" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media record */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding utterance */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the audio file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file */,
  "media_start" REAL /* Start time of media in seconds */,
  "media_end" REAL /* End time of media in seconds */,
  "media_unit" TEXT /* Unit of media (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)
column_names: Type of the utterance (e.g., declarative, question)
Number of morphemes in the utterance
Number of tokens in the utterance
Order of the utterance in the sequence
ID of the corpus from which the utterance is drawn
Part of speech of the utterance
Date when the utterance was recorded
Confidence score of the phonological analysis
Start time of media in seconds
End time of media in seconds
ID of the collection to which this utterance belongs
Role of the speaker (e.g., mother, father)
Unique identifier for each target child
Date of birth of the target child
Developmental stage of the target child
Date when the transcription was done
Unique identifier for each media record
File path of the audio file
Start time of media in seconds
End time of media in seconds
Date when the collection was created
